creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Dominic has analysed the problem quite well, you are probably 
hitting a mirror that hasn't finished syncronising with the 
master server yet, leading to some inconsistencies.  
Unfortunately, with the current infrastructure there is little 
there can be done as there are several ways for mirrors to 
syncronise and there is no one generic solution in use.
